awesomeListMeta.descriptionHTML: A curated list of useful resources for JavaScript Promises
awesomeListMeta.description: A curated list of useful resources for JavaScript Promises

nodes.itemHTML: • Promise Funstars4.1k - @sindresorhus's notes, patterns, and solutions to common Promise problems
• promise-nodeifystars1 - Standalone nodeify method which calls a Node-style callback on resolution or rejection.
• delaystars515 - Delay a promise a specified amount of time.
• loud-rejectionstars282 - Make unhandled promise rejections fail loudly instead of the default silent fail.
• hard-rejectionstars102 - Make unhandled promise rejections fail hard right away instead of the default silent fail
• p-queuestars2.3k - Promise queue with concurrency control
• p-breakstars19 - Break out of a promise chain
• p-lazystars247 - Create a lazy promise that defers execution until .then() or .catch() is called
• p-deferstars58 - Create a deferred promise
• p-ifstars62 - Conditional promise chains
• p-tapstars132 - Tap into a promise chain without affecting its value or state
• p-mapstars907 - Map over promises concurrently
• p-allstars212 - Run promise-returning & async functions concurrently with optional limited concurrency
• p-limitstars1.1k - Run multiple promise-returning & async functions with limited concurrency
• p-timesstars35 - Run promise-returning & async functions a specific number of times concurrently
• p-catch-ifstars38 - Conditional promise catch handler
• p-timestars65 - Measure the time a promise takes to resolve
• p-logstars25 - Log the value/error of a promise
• p-filterstars62 - Filter promises concurrently
• p-settlestars81 - Settle promises concurrently and get their fulfillment value or rejection reason
• p-memoizestars310 - Memoize promise-returning & async functions
• p-whilststars45 - Calls a function repeatedly while a condition returns true and then resolves the promise
• p-throttlestars289 - Throttle promise-returning & async functions
• p-debouncestars152 - Debounce promise-returning & async functions
• p-retrystars568 - Retry a promise-returning or async function
• p-wait-forstars121 - Wait for a condition to be true
• p-timeoutstars205 - Timeout a promise after a specified amount of time
• p-racestars36 - A better Promise.race()
• p-trystars42 - Promise#try() ponyfill - Starts a promise chain
• p-finallystars47 - Promise#finally() ponyfill - Invoked when the promise is settled regardless of outcome
• p-anystars53 - Wait for any promise to be fulfilled
• p-somestars34 - Wait for a specified number of promises to be fulfilled
• p-pipestars109 - Compose promise-returning & async functions into a reusable pipeline
• p-each-seriesstars46 - Iterate over promises serially
• p-map-seriesstars44 - Map over promises serially
• p-reducestars64 - Reduce a list of values using promises into a promise for a value
• p-propsstars167 - Like Promise.all() but for Map and Object
• creedstars270 - Hyper performant & full featured like Bluebird, but FP-oriented. Coroutines, generators, promises, ES2015 iterables, & fantasy-land spec.
• An Incremental Tutorial on Promises - An FAQ styled tutorial for beginners.
• JavaScript Promises: an Introduction - Basics of JavaScript's native promise implementation.
• Promise it won't hurtstars718 - An interactive nodeschool workshop
• Async functions - making promises friendly
• promise-semaphorestars29 - Push a set of work to be done in a configurable serial fashion
• We have a problem with promises - "Many of us are using promises without really understanding them."
• es6-promisestars7.3k - Opt-in polyfill. A strict-spec subset of rsvp.js.
• promise-do-whilststars3 - Calls a function repeatedly while a condition returns true and then resolves the promise.
• ES6 Promises in Depth
• Promisees - Promise visualization playground for the adventurous.
• promise-do-untilstars1 - Calls a function repeatedly until a condition returns true and then resolves the promise.
• ES6 Kata Promises - Promises Katas : Basics
• Promise anti-patterns (2) - Another set of promises anti-patterns
• Javascript Promises...In Wicked Detail - Recreate the promise implementation
• Writing Promise-Using Specifications - "This document gives guidance on how to write specifications that create, accept, or manipulate promises"
• Promises/A+ specification
• You're Missing the Point of Promises - Promises are much more than callback aggregation, and that jQuery's implementation (prior to 3.0) isn't enough.
• Promise anti-patterns - Common misuses and how to avoid them.
• caniuse promises
• Fates and States - Quick definitions of possible states.
• Promise Ponderings, (Anti-)Patterns, and Apologies - Promise behaviour demonstrated and explained by common questions and their answers.
• Promises for Asynchronous Programming - Chapter from Exploring ES6
• You Don't Know JS: Promises - Chapter from You Don't Know JS: Async & Performance
• Promise Cookbookstars1.6k - The why, what, and how. "A brief introduction [...] primarily aimed at frontend developers".
• JavaScript with Promises - from O'Reilly. Short and to-the-point. Uses native and bluebird.
• pinkiestars138 - Ponyfill. Node-oriented, but browserifyablestars14.2k. Extremely small implementation.
• native-promise-onlystars717 - Polyfill. Browser and node-compatible.
• liestars744 - Small, browserifyable with an opt-in polyfill.
• pifystars1.5k - Promisify ("denodify") a callback-style function.
• lie-fs - Promise wrappers for Node's FS API.
• bluebirdstars20.2k - Fully featured, extremely performant. Long stack traces & generator/coroutine support.
• rsvp.jsstars3.6k - Lightweight with a few extras. Compatible down to IE6!
• Qstars15k - One of the original implementations. Long stack traces and other goodies.
• then/promisestars2.5k - Small with nodeify, denodify and done() additions.
• when.jsstars3.4k - Packed with control flow, functional, and utility methods.
• native-or-bluebird - Helps transition to completely native.
• pinkie-promisestars120 - Use native, or fall back to pinkie. Great for node library authors.
• any-promisestars179 - Loads the first available implementation. Safe for browserify.
• promise-methodstars2 - Standalone bluebird.method. Turn a synchronously-returning method into a promise-returning one.
• is-promisestars275 - Determine if something looks like a Promise.
• spromstars14 - Resolve when a stream ends. Optional buffering (be careful with this!)
• task.jsstars1.6k - Write async functions in a blocking style using promises and generators. Like bluebird.coroutine.
• costars11.8k - Like task.js and bluebird.coroutine, but supports thunks too.
